title: The One With The Memorial Service

lines.text: Ross' apartment , Chandler and Joey enter

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! Ready to go?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh yeah, let me just finish this.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey Ross, check this out! (he tries to spin a basketball on his fingertip but he throws it against a table) yeah, I can't do that!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What are you doin'?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Have you seen this? It's a new alumni website for college! It's cool! You can post messages for people, let everyone know what you're up to.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Great, a faster way to tell people that I'm unemployed and childless .

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's actually kinda interesting to find out what people are doing... remember Andrea Rich?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The tall girl who wouldn't sleep with you?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh uh... well, her Internet Company went under and she lost an ear in a boating accident...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Bet she'd sleep with you now...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No... I already e-mailed her.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Let me see what you wrote about yourself: "Doctor Paleontology, two kids... " (pause) You split with Carol because you have different interests?... I think you split with Carol because you've one very similar interest!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You know what? I'm gonna finish this later, ok? Let me just grab my coat.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! (he throws the basketball against a table again)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (he picks up the ball) What do you think you learnt how to do in the last two minutes?? (he enters another room)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Maybe we finish this for him! (he sits down on the sofa and he start typing on Ross' computer) "Also I cloned a dinosaur in my lab. She's now my girlfriend. I don't care what society says. It's the best sex I've ever had"... aaand SEND!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (he stops Chandler from posting the message) No, no, no... what do... you can't do that to him!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (he comes back) Alright, let's go!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Dude! (he opens his arms to receive the ball from Ross' hands)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I think you made it clear you cannot be trusted with the ball inside the house!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (after Ross leaves the room) aaand SEND! (he hits the send button)
Opening credits
Joey and Rachel's apartment

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey! How was basketball?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, it was a lot of fun right up until Chandler got a finger in the eye!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, no! Who did that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Chandler... hey... (he goes towards his room but he stops near Emma's cot) Rach... what's Hugsy doin' in the crib with Emma? (he looks puzzled)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She was just crawling around and she found him, so I just let her sleep with him. That's all right? Isn't it?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (still very puzzled) Oh, yeah... of course... yeah... it's a stuffed animal... you know... it's for kids... not for adults... I know that!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey... are you sure? I mean, I know how much you love him!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Rachel... let's be clear on this, ok? I do not love Hugsy. I like him a normal amount...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right... Oh, Emma loves him!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why wouldn't she? He's a wonderful person!
Central Perk

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Phoebe... how you doin'? You feelin' better?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Breaking up sucks! Oh, I really miss Mike!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, I'm so sorry!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh God, I tried everything to make myself feel better. I even tried writing a song about it... but... I can't think of anything that rhymes with AARRGGHH!! (pause) Hey Monica, I really need your help getting through this...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You're not gonna need my help?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well no, when I get to the point where... you know... I'm ready to hear cruel mocking jokes about Mike... I'm gonna come to you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh good, 'cause I've already thought of 3... 4! I've just thought of a fourth (he goes towards the counter)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok. I mean I know I did the right thing. You know, Mike never wants to get married and I shouldn't be in a relationship that has no future... but... pretty soon I'm gonna miss him so much. I'm gonna wanna see him again and you have to stop me from doing that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ok, you got it!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (after a pause) Unless... Maybe it's too crazy about this... Alright so... you know, there is no future... but that doesn't mean we still can't have fun. You know what? Forget what I said.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really? If that's what you want...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That was a test and you just failed.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Damn it! Rookie mistake!
Ross enters and he's really angry. He goes towards Chandler who's sitting at the counter

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (yelling at Chandler) I have sex with dinosaurs??

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I believe I read that somewhere!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That only is not funny, it's physically impossible! Ok? Depending on the species I'd have to have a six foot long... (pause) It's not funny!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I respectfully disagree.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I can't believe you put that on my alumni page!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Who cares? Nobody reads those things

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You'd better hope not because I just read what you put on your page today.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't have a page.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh oh oh! I RESPECTFULLY DISAGREE!!
Rachel's room. Rachel and Emma are sleeping; Joey sneaks in and approaches the crib

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look at you, all sweet and innocent, sleeping like an angel... with Emma's chubby little hands wrapped around ya. (he picks up Hugsy) It's okay, Emma, you stay asleep. (Emma cries)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (threatening Joey with a scrunchy): Step away from the crib, I have a weapon!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's okay, it's okay Rach, it's me. Put down the scrunchy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I heard Emma stirring, so I came to make sure she could reach Hugsy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, oh thanks. Alright well, now that I'm up I'm going to go to the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (placing Hugsy back in the crib) There you go sweetie... (to Emma) This isn't over.
Monica and Chandler's. Chandler is looking at the screen of his laptop, shaking his head.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Alright, wait a second, why would Ross tell everyone in your class that you are as... (reads from the screen) "gay as the day is long"?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Because I told everyone he slept with dinosaurs.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But that's clearly a joke. This could easily be true. (Phone rings)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Would you get that please? People have been calling to congratulate me all day.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (On the phone) Hello? No, he's not here. Yeah, this is his wife. Yeah, well, it came as quite a shock to me too. I guess I should have known. Yeah, I mean, he just kept making me watch Moulin Rouge.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hang up, hang up. And that was a great movie! (Monica hangs up) I'm so gonna get back at Ross... oh yeah, this will show him, here we go (starts typing something).

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, you'll see my friend.
[Time lapse, still Chandler and Monica's, but only Chandler is there. Enter Ross]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (visibly upset) I'm dead?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (faking sympathy) And so young.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Posting that I died? That really isn't funny.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, how you died was funny.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh please, hit by a blimp?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It kills over one americans every year.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Unbelievable, my classmates are gonna think I'm dead, my professors, my... my parents are gonna get phone calls. You're messing with people's feelings here.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You wanna talk about people's feelings? You should have heard how hurt professor Stern was yesterday when I told him I wouldn't be able to go with him to Key West!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You've really crossed the line here, but that's okay, it's ok 'cause I'm on my way to buy some Photoshop software and a stack of gay porn. That's right! Your coming out is about to get real graphic.
Phoebe's apartment

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: God, I wish Mike were here.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay if Mike were here what would the two of you be doing?
Phoebe gives her a meaningful look

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you, animals? It's 4 o'clock in the afternoon!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I gotta call him. Just to talk to him, there's no harm in that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe, that's how it starts. I don't need to eat the cake, I'll just smell the icing... why don't I just eat a little sliver, or, okay, just a slice or two. And next thing you know, you're 210 pounds and you get wedged in going down the tunnel slide. Phoebe, honey, I know this is hard. Look, if you talk to him, you're going to wanna see him. And if you see him, you're going to want to get back together with him. I know that's not what you want. (pause) Give me your phone.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Here.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And now your cell.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay (she takes a huge, clearly obsolete cellphone she keeps in a closet and gives it to Monica)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: This is your cellphone?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: This is your current cellphone?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes, it reminds me of a simpler time.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe, where's your purse?
They run for Phoebe's purse, Phoebe gets there first and takes the cell. Monica tries to take it away from her

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, no! Give it to me!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You can't have it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Give it to me!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No (tucks it in her pants)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'll go in there.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (disbelievingly) Oh yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe come here
they fight a little, the phone falls and Monica picks it up

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Haha!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Damn you Monica Geller hyphen Bing!
Joey and Rachel's. Enter Joey

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, look who's here! It's Joey, and he brought home a friend.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey, Emma's right here! You promised not to bring girls home in the middle of the day anymore.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, no, it's not a girl, it's... a brand new Hugsy!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh that's so great, now Emma has two Hugsy's.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, no, Emma has one Hugsy, the new Hugsy, huh? The other Hugsy, I don't know, I guess I'll just take it back.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh you know what? When I was a little girl I had a little pink pony named Cotton. Oh I loved her so much, I took her everywhere, I would braid her tail...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Make the transfer! (She does so)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Should I be concerned that a button fell off the old Hugsy and I can't find it?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, no don't worry about that, I swallowed that years ago.
Emma cries

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I don't think she likes the new Hugsy.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But he's the same.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, I think she wants the old one back.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But he's the same.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey, come on!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: He's the same!
they exchange Hugsy's).

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to the new Hugsy) You're not the same!
Phoebe's apartment. Enter Monica

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Haha!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You know, it's a lot less surprising to do that after I've buzzed you into the building.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So Phoebe, why are there men's shoes by the door.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Those are my shoes.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, when you get over this breakup we need to go shopping.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Monica, I really appreciate you checking in on me, but I'm actually feeling a lot better. Yeah, I just kinda want to be alone right now.
Someone knocks on the door

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Who's that? (goes to open door)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I ordered Chinese food.
Monica opens the door and Mike is standing at the doorway

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What are the chances? 1 billion Chinese people and they send Mike!?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Mike) What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Phoebe called me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm sorry, I broke down... I wanted to see him.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Damnit Phoebe! How did you even call him?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: There is a speakerphone on the base unit...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Base Unit! Think Monica! Think!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Look, if I wanna see Phoebe and she wants to see...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (to Mike) This doesn't concern you!!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Oh! Sorry, I guess I was thrown off by the mention of my name!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Look, guys, you can't do this, it's just going to make getting over each other, that much harder.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Not if nothing happens. Why can't... why can't we just hang out as friends?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Sure! If you're just gonna hang out as friends, then maybe I'll join ya. You know, I'm your friend (to Phoebe) and Mike's friend (Mike is sceptical).

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Sit down.
Phoebe and Mike sit next to each other

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh wow wow wow!! Make room for your friend! (sits herself down between them)

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: (to Phoebe) So how've you been?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I've been pretty good!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: (to Phoebe) You look really beautiful.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thanks, you look good too.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh no no no no... this is dangerous territory. Keep it clean!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So how's the piano playing going?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Actually I've been playing a lot of love songs lately. I've missed you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I've missed you too.
Silence

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You know, on the way over here, I saw this drunk guy throw up. And then a pigeon ate it!
Ross's Apartment: Ross is doing something on his laptop when Chandler walks in

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, Ross, I just wanted to apologize... (looks at laptop screen)..don't tell me you actually made those gay pictures of me?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: uhu uhu, check this out. (Chandler sits down and looks at laptop screen)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Huh! So that's what I would look like if I worked out... and was being serviced by a policeman. You're not actually going to send these out are ya?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Eh..actually no, I don't need to because your little "Ross is dead" joke didn't work, ok, there were no responses. Nobody posted anything on the website, nobody called my parents, so the joke my friend is on you. Nobody called, nobody wrote anything, nobody cares that I'm dead. (silence) Oh my God! Nobody cares that I'm dead!?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, come on, you know that's not true.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What are you talking about? You get sixty responses just for coming out of the closet! I didn't get one response! And I'm dead!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, the gay community is a lot more vocal than the dead community.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I can't believe this. Not even my geology lab partner? And I carried that guy! (gets up from his sofa)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Alright look, let's think about this, ok, do you really think that people are gonna stir up your family at this tragic time? That people are gonna post condolences on a website? This is not about people not caring that you're dead .This is about people not having a decent outlet for their grief.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're right. There isn't a decent outlet.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Right, I mean, come on, I'm sure that if you had a funeral or a memorial service, tons of people would come.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Exactly!! (sits back down at his laptop and starts typing)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ross, what're you... what're you... what are you doing? (looks at laptop screen)You're having a memorial service for yourself!?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No! That would be stupid! You're having it for me!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ross, don't press send, don't press se... !

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: oh, too late, too late! It's sent... oops sorry and so is the picture of you and the police man...
Joey's room: Joey is sitting on his bed reading DooL transcript when Rachel walks in

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm trying to put Emma down for a nap, have you seen Hugsy?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Original or crappy?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Original.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, sorry haven't seen him.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Then what's that big lump under your covers?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's Monica, ok?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's not Monica!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Alright!! Fine! It's original Hugsy! No, now I know that Emma wants him but he's mine and I need him..

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (to herself) Oh God.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: ... she's being unreasonable!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (yelling) Joey, there is a reason that Emma loves that stupid penguin so much (Joey covers Hugsy's ears) Oh don't cover its ears! (stops yelling) It's because it reminds her of her uncle Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It does?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! And she's comforted by him because she loves her uncle Joey so much.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Really? She... she loves me?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yeah! But you know what? If you need Hugsy, don't worry. Emma will totally understand. I won't... but whatever (She leaves the room).

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ok, wait wait wait wait a minute wait a minute, I mean Rach, I mean if if... . If Hugsy means that much to Emma then... well she can have him.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oooh... you're sweet, I knew uncle Joey would step up. (Turns to face Emma in the the playpen) Look Emma, look who's baaack!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look forget it forget it... I can't do it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Are you gonna... you're going to take Hugsy away from a little child?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How do you think I got him in the first place?
Phoebe's apartment: Phoebe, Monica and Mike sitting on the couch
Monica is getting up from the couch

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Alright you two, I'm gonna go to the bathroom. Now I don't want anything going on while I'm gone. Here's a few things you can discuss: mucus, fungus and the idea of me and Ross doing it.

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: I've missed you so much! No, I'm not gonna ask you to get back together because I know we want different things, but just to be with you one more night.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know, I want that too, but IS that going to make it too hard?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: It can't be any harder than this... I mean, If I had known the last time I saw you would be the last time, I... I would have stopped to memorize your face, the way you move, everything about you. If I had known the last time I kissed you would have been the last time... I never would have stopped.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (running back into the room) Kiss him, you fool!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Didn't you hear that speech? If you don't kiss him then I will!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I missed you so much! (she kisses Mike)

lines.speaker: Strange man
lines.text: (he bounds into the house) I knew you'd be here!

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: Oh, crap!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Who is this?

lines.speaker: Mike
lines.text: My friend Manny. I asked him to keep me away from you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi, that's what I'm doing for Phoebe!

lines.speaker: Manny
lines.text: Well, you are not doing a very good job!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Manny
lines.text: What's with the kissing?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, at least I knew where my guy was.

lines.speaker: Manny
lines.text: Oh yeah yeah, thank God you were here to oversee all the kissing!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You didn't hear the speech!

lines.speaker: Manny
lines.text: I've heard the speech: (in a mocking voice) "if he knew it was gonna be the last time he saw her... "

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, it was very moving! You're just heartless!

lines.speaker: Manny
lines.text: You're weak!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're... weird!

lines.speaker: Manny
lines.text: Your pants are undone!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh (realizes her pants are undone and zips them up)!

lines.speaker: Manny
lines.text: (looking at the sofa) Where did they go?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Damn it!

lines.speaker: Manny
lines.text: Oh we blew it. I blame myself.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And I blame you too.
Monica and Chandler's apartment

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's been an hour and not one of my classmates has shown up! I tell you, when I actually die some people are gonna get seriously haunted!
someone knocks on the door

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: There you go! Someone came!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ok, ok! I'm gonna go hide! Oh, this is so exciting, my first mourner! (he hides in the bedroom and closes the door)
Chandler and Monica go open the door

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hi, glad you could come.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (in a mournful voice) Please, come in.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Hi, you're Chandler Bing, right? I'm Tom Gordon, I was in your class.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yes, yes... let me... take your coat.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Thanks... uh... I'm so sorry about Ross, it's...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: At least he died doing what he loved... watching blimps (he goes in the bedroom)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Who is he?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Some guy, Tom Gordon.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't remember him, but then again I touched so many lives. (they press their ears against the door)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So, did you know Ross well?

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: Oh, actually I barely knew him. Yeah, I came because I heard Chandler's news. D'you know if he's seeing anyone?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (a bit surprised) Yes, he is. Me.

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: What? You... You... Oh! Can I ask you a personal question? Ho-how do you shave your beard so close?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering, very upset) Ok Tommy, that's enough mourning for you! Here we go, bye bye!! (he shoves him out the door)

lines.speaker: Tom
lines.text: (before leaving) Hey, listen. Call me.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ok! (shuts the door behind Tom)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (coming in) I'm dead and no one cares?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I look like a man??

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Please, one ridiculous problem at a time!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It isn't ridiculous, look around! No one's here!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You gave them one day's notice, not everyone in our class checks the web site everyday and Monica... it's probably the way you stand!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes, you're right. Still somebody must have seen it... I mean, I went to that school for 4 years, I didn't have an impact on anyone?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, that's not true. You had an impact on me, I mean, it's 15 years later and we're still best friends. Doesn't that count for something?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (sceptical) Yeah...
someone knocks on the door) Oh, great. More party boys for Chandler!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm sure it's somebody for you. Now, go hide. (Ross hides in the bedroom again)
Chandlers opens the door. A beautiful woman stands at the doorway.

lines.speaker: Kori
lines.text: Hi. I'm here for Ross Geller's memorial service.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Kori? Kori Weston?

lines.speaker: Kori
lines.text: Yeah...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wow! You look amazing!

lines.speaker: Kori
lines.text: And you are...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Chandler, Chandler Bing. I'm not gay, I'm not gay at all.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You are married though.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Don't listen to him, he's in a really bad mood! (lets her in)

lines.speaker: Kori
lines.text: I can't believe that Ross is gone. It is just so sad.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I didn't know Ross and you were so close.

lines.speaker: Kori
lines.text: We weren't but we had one class together. He was such a great guy and he talked so passionately about science. I always remembered him.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm sure that would mean a lot to him. And if heaven has a door, I'm sure he's pressing his ear up against it and listening intently.

lines.speaker: Kori
lines.text: I thought so many times about calling him and asking him out. I guess I really missed my chance.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (he bounds into the lounge room) But you didn't! I'm still alive!! Kori, I know this is a big surprise for you. It's a long story but the things you just said really made my day! I mean, the fact that you are here means more to me than if this room were filled with people!

lines.speaker: Kori
lines.text: You sick freak, who does that? I can't believe I had a crush on you! (she leaves and slams the door behind her)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Did you hear that? Kori Weston had a crush on me!!
Ending Credits
Ross' apartment

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (on the phone) No Mum, I'm not dead. I know it's not something to kid about. It was just a practical joke between Chandler and me, but it's over, ok? (pause) Actually no, even if I had died, you would not be left childless. (pause) Monica?
